steps.title: Find what wins Edward over
steps.content: Nathaniel offers to stay on board and go wherever Edward suggests. The passage says this affectionate willingness to follow Edward's plans won the old man's heart.

steps.title: Name the relationship effect
steps.content: The matching choice captures how Nathaniel's flexibility and consideration strengthen his relationship with Edward. Choice B focuses only on sleeping arrangements, Choice C invents excitement about a journey, and Choice D invents Edward's initial wariness. The answer is A.
